api: Kyriba tenant REST API v1 (https://api.kyriba.com/api/v1, tenant-overridable)
scope: Migration of internal/connectors/kyriba: the 4 legacy-parity read collection endpoints only (bank-accounts, transactions, statements, payments). Kyriba deployments vary by tenant; legacy itself keeps live support bounded to these documented-style v1 collection endpoints. Kyriba's full documented API surface (cash positioning, forecasting, exposures, admin/config endpoints, and any tenant-specific extensions) is out of scope until Pass B.

excluded.reason: Pass B capability expansion; not implemented by legacy
